channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nasdaq on pace for record close in final hour as tech leads stocks higher — live
Virginia redistricting election win buoys congressional Democrats
item.description: Virginia voted by a slim margin on Tuesday to approve U.S. House district maps that could allow Democrats to flip four seats in the state this Novembe...

item.title: Iran attacks oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices back above $100
Tesla earnings are out — and the stock is climbing. Here’s what to know.
Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat seeking his 13th term in Congress, dies at age 80
item.description: U.S. Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat and the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has died at age 80.

item.title: Pirro says DOJ won't drop Fed probe, will appeal judge's order blocking Powell subpoenas
item.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of targeting him for refusing to obey Trump's demand that the Fed sharply lower interest rates.

item.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
item.description: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.

item.title: Flight cuts are spreading as fuel costs surge. Higher fares are likely coming.
Thief who swiped purse of ex-DHS chief Kristi Noem gets 3 years in prison
item.description: The man, Chilean national Mario Bustamante Leiva, "came to Washington illegally to prey on citizens of the District," said U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro...

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 close at record highs as tech sector drives stock-market gains
